titleStmt.title: SII 9.331: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 331. (A.R. No. 90-A of 1904.) ON THE SIXTH SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Aṅgirasa, Mārgaśira, ba. 8, Sōmavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1212 December 17, Monday. The Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara Vīrajagadāla Bammidēvarasa, son of Hariharadēva and grandson of Nāchidēva of Koṭṭūru, is said to have made a gift of a large tract of land for the service of the god Kalidēvasvāmi. The gift was made in the presence of his teacher Sōmayājya-Hiriyaṇṇa of Arasiyabīḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatyēṣa maThis is written in continuation
hādēvō viśvarakṣāvicaṣaṇaḥ yassastamunimōdārtthamāvirbbhūtaḥ kalānidhiḥ .
svasti śrīmatu Āṁgīrasasaṁvatsada mārggaśira bahuḷadaṣṭa�vo 8 sōmavāradaṁ
du mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ koṭṭūra nācidēvana maṁma hariharadēvana putranuṁ śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vipraprasāda vīrajagadāḷa baṁmidēvarasaru sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutirdu tammārādhyararasiyabīḍina sōmayājya hiri
yaṇnaṁgaḷa saṁnidhiyalu śrīmatu hariścaṁdradattiyamahāgrahā
raṁ bāḷguḷiya śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvara Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ Alliya
mahājanakkaṁ naṁdiyabēhūra mēlāḷike maṁneyasahita Ā vūra
caturāghāṭa sīmeyiṁdoḷa samastabhūmiyanitumaṁ sarbbābādheparihā
ravāgi dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa dharmma .
Digital edition of SII 9.331 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
